design_philosophy: Raw, anti-corporate, highly functional mechanical aesthetic. Mimics physical workshop environments and industrial control panels. Zero soft edges. High contrast. Exposed structural grids.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-normal font-['Bebas_Neue'] uppercase tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-normal font-['Bebas_Neue'] uppercase tracking-tight text-orange-500
hierarchy.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-bold font-['Space_Mono'] uppercase text-white
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs font-bold font-['Space_Mono'] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-400

spacing_and_layout.global_spacing: Generous spacing within components, tight gaps between structural panels.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dashboard style). Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-0 with borders) and exposed layout lines. `border-collapse` aesthetics. Grid items should stretch to fill heights. Use `p-6` or `p-8` inside bordered containers.
spacing_and_layout.hero_overlay: bg-black/60 (Never darker, allow mechanical textures to show through).

components.general_rules: No border radius (`rounded-none`). Hard offset shadows instead of soft blurs. Abrupt interaction states (no ease-in-out transitions).

buttons.primary: rounded-none border-2 border-orange-600 bg-orange-600 text-black font-bold font-['Space_Mono'] uppercase px-6 py-3 shadow-[4px_4px_0_#ffffff] hover:shadow-none hover:translate-x-[4px] hover:translate-y-[4px] transition-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-black
buttons.secondary: rounded-none border-2 border-zinc-600 bg-transparent text-white font-bold font-['Space_Mono'] uppercase px-6 py-3 shadow-[4px_4px_0_#ea580c] hover:shadow-none hover:translate-x-[4px] hover:translate-y-[4px] transition-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500

cards.style: rounded-none border-2 border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0_#ea580c] hover:border-orange-600 transition-none relative

inputs.style: rounded-none border-2 border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-900 text-white font-['Space_Mono'] p-3 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0_#ea580c] outline-none transition-none

badges_labels.style: rounded-none bg-orange-600/20 border border-orange-600 text-orange-500 font-['Space_Mono'] text-xs font-bold uppercase px-2 py-1

components.shadcn_overrides: Override all Shadcn UI components to have `rounded-none`. Strip `transition-all` and replace with `transition-none` for brutalist physical feel. Override soft shadows.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Abrupt color inversion or shadow snapping. Mimic physical hardware buttons being pressed.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Harsh, visible dotted lines or thick neon solid outlines. Essential for accessibility in brutalist design.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Instant cut or stark wipe, avoiding smooth fades.

icons_and_assets.style: Use technical, geometric icons. Stroke width 2px. No rounded caps if avoidable.

images.description: Dark workshop tools background, high contrast, perfect for the main landing hero section. Apply a black/60 overlay.
Woodworking tools and lumber for a sample DIY project card (e.g., 'Build a Workbench').
Mechanic repairing a car engine for a sample DIY project card (e.g., 'Engine Repair Basics').

testing.data_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, project cards, search input, save toggles, login buttons) MUST include `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

key_features_implementation.search_bar: Command-line style input. Oversized, full width on desktop, prominent in the header.
key_features_implementation.project_feed: Bento grid with masonry or strict row-based control room alignment. Cards must have brutalist borders.
key_features_implementation.project_detail: Schematic layout. Steps listed in monospace numerals (01, 02, 03). Tools & Materials in a hard-lined HTML table or grid.
key_features_implementation.save_favorites: Toggle button that physically visually depresses (shadow disappears, translates down/right).
key_features_implementation.google_login: Brutalist Google Auth button. No pill shapes. Strict rectangle.
